subject: inquiry
description: Inquiry into the nature of the self; beliefs and values; personal, physical, mental, social and spiritual health; human relationships including families, friends, communities, and cultures; rights and responsibilities; what it means to be human.

domains.name: 身份认同 / Identity / Identity & Self

nodes.name: 自我意识
curriculum_points: An inquiry into the nature of the self; beliefs and values; personal, physical, mental, social and spiritual health; human relationships including families, friends, communities and cultures; rights and responsibilities; what it means to be human.

nodes.name: 个人身份
curriculum_points: An inquiry into the nature of the self; beliefs and values; personal, physical, mental, social and spiritual health; human relationships including families, friends, communities and cultures; rights and responsibilities; what it means to be human.

nodes.name: 文化身份
curriculum_points: An inquiry into the nature of the self; beliefs and values; personal, physical, mental, social and spiritual health; human relationships including families, friends, communities and cultures; rights and responsibilities; what it means to be human.

nodes.name: 价值观与信念
curriculum_points: An inquiry into the nature of the self; beliefs and values; personal, physical, mental, social and spiritual health; human relationships including families, friends, communities and cultures; rights and responsibilities; what it means to be human.

nodes.name: 自我表达
curriculum_points: An inquiry into the ways in which we discover and express ideas, feelings, nature, culture, beliefs and values; the ways in which we reflect on, extend and enjoy our creativity; our appreciation of the aesthetic.

domains.name: 健康与福祉 / Health & Wellbeing / Health & Wellbeing

nodes.name: 身体健康
curriculum_points: An inquiry into the nature of the self; beliefs and values; personal, physical, mental, social and spiritual health; human relationships including families, friends, communities and cultures; rights and responsibilities; what it means to be human.

nodes.name: 心理福祉
curriculum_points: An inquiry into the nature of the self; beliefs and values; personal, physical, mental, social and spiritual health; human relationships including families, friends, communities and cultures; rights and responsibilities; what it means to be human.

nodes.name: 营养与饮食
curriculum_points: Students in Early Years will be able to identify foods that contribute to a healthy body and explain their importance for growth and energy.
Students in Upper Primary will be able to analyze personal and cultural dietary choices, making connections to physical health and well-being as part of a balanced lifestyle.

nodes.name: 情绪调节
curriculum_points: Students in Lower Primary will be able to identify and name a range of feelings in themselves and others, and demonstrate simple strategies (e.g., breathing, quiet time) to manage them.
Students will be able to reflect on the causes and effects of their emotions and develop a personal toolkit of positive coping strategies to promote their mental well-being.

nodes.name: 个人安全
curriculum_points: Students will be able to identify trusted adults in their community and articulate clear safety rules for different contexts, including digital environments.
Students in Middle/Upper Primary will be able to assess potential risks, assert their right to safety, and demonstrate responsible decision-making to protect themselves and others.

domains.name: 关系与社群 / Relationships & Community / Relationships

nodes.name: 家庭关系
curriculum_points: An inquiry into the nature of the self; beliefs and values; personal, physical, mental, social and spiritual health; human relationships including families, friends, communities and cultures; rights and responsibilities; what it means to be human.

nodes.name: 友谊
curriculum_points: An inquiry into the nature of the self; beliefs and values; personal, physical, mental, social and spiritual health; human relationships including families, friends, communities and cultures; rights and responsibilities; what it means to be human.

nodes.name: 社区归属
curriculum_points: An inquiry into the nature of the self; beliefs and values; personal, physical, mental, social and spiritual health; human relationships including families, friends, communities and cultures; rights and responsibilities; what it means to be human.

nodes.name: 同理心
curriculum_points: Students in Early Years/Lower Primary will be able to recognize and describe the feelings and perspectives of others through stories, role-play, and shared experiences.
Students will be able to demonstrate empathy and compassion by taking thoughtful action to support the well-being of individuals and groups within their community.

nodes.name: 冲突解决
curriculum_points: Students in Lower Primary will be able to use 'I' statements to express their feelings during a disagreement and listen actively to the perspective of others.
Students in Upper Primary will be able to apply a range of conflict resolution strategies, such as negotiation and mediation, to resolve interpersonal problems peacefully and fairly.

domains.name: 权利与责任 / Rights & Responsibilities / Rights & Responsibilities

nodes.name: 儿童权利
curriculum_points: An inquiry into the nature of the self; beliefs and values; personal, physical, mental, social and spiritual health; human relationships including families, friends, communities and cultures; rights and responsibilities; what it means to be human.

nodes.name: 个人责任
curriculum_points: An inquiry into the nature of the self; beliefs and values; personal, physical, mental, social and spiritual health; human relationships including families, friends, communities and cultures; rights and responsibilities; what it means to be human.

nodes.name: 公平与正义
curriculum_points: Students will be able to identify examples of fairness and unfairness in familiar situations and explain their reasoning using the language of rights and responsibilities.
Students will be able to analyze real-world scenarios to understand issues of justice, and propose actions that promote equity and inclusive practices within their sphere of influence.

nodes.name: 多样性与包容
curriculum_points: Students will be able to describe ways in which people are similar and different, appreciating the unique identities, abilities, and cultural backgrounds within their classroom.

Students will be able to investigate and respect diverse perspectives, beliefs, and family structures, and advocate for an inclusive environment where everyone feels valued and has a sense of belonging.
